title: SquidGame
description: The TV Show games now playable in minecraft with this plugin!
body:
🎮 SquidGames Minecraft Plugin

Currently in Alpha!

📦 Dependencies

  • Required: WorldEdit

  • Optional: PlaceholderAPI (for additional features)

📚 Setup Wiki

For detailed setup instructions, visit the official wiki:
SquidGame Plugin Wiki

🕹️ Supported Games

The plugin supports multiple arenas and includes the following games:

  • Game 1: Red Light, Green Light

  • Game 3: Dorms Battle

  • Game 5: Glass Stepping Stones

  • Game 6: Sumo

🚀 Features

  • Multi-Arena Support: Host multiple games simultaneously in different arenas.

  • Customizable: Easily configure games to fit your server's needs.

  • Expandable: More games and features are planned for future updates!

⚠️ Note

This plugin is currently in Alpha, so expect bugs and unfinished features. Feedback and contributions are welcome!

Let me know if you'd like further improvements! 🛠️
